title: Invocore (Code Library)
body:
**Alone this mod does not add anything meaningful for players**

 

A code library for all of my mods (For rendering, or getting time inbetween partial ticks, etc):

**Ars Mage Fight** (Soon to be incorperated)

**XP Shop** ( [Click for mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xp-shop "XP SHOP") )  
**Ars Nouveau: G.E.A.R.S** (Soon to be incorperated)

**Revive Me!** ([Click for mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/revive-me))

 

**YOU CAN USE THIS IN YOUR MOD**, but I make no promises that it will be easy!
